name: list_projects
description: Lists the first 10 Neon projects in your account. If you can't find the project, increase the limit by passing a higher value to the `limit` parameter. Optionally filter by project name or ID using the `search` parameter.

cursor.description: Specify the cursor value from the previous response to retrieve the next batch of projects.

limit.description: Specify a value from 1 to 400 to limit number of projects in the response.

search.description: Search by project name or id. You can specify partial name or id values to filter results.

name: list_organizations
description: Lists all organizations that the current user has access to. Optionally filter by organization name or ID using the `search` parameter.

search.description: Filter by organization name or ID

name: list_shared_projects
description: Lists projects that have been shared with the current user. These are projects that the user has been granted access to collaborate on. Optionally filter by project name or ID using the `search` parameter.

search.description: Filter by project name or ID

name: create_project
description: Create a new Neon project. If someone is trying to create a database, use this tool.

name.description: An optional name of the project to create.

org_id.description: Create project in a specific organization.

name: delete_project
description: Delete a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project to delete

name: describe_project
description: Describes a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project to describe

name: run_sql
description:
<use_case>
      Use this tool to execute a single SQL statement against a Neon database.
    </use_case>

    <important_notes>
      If you have a temporary branch from a prior step, you MUST:
      1. Pass the branch ID to this tool unless explicitly told otherwise
      2. Tell the user that you are using the temporary branch with ID [branch_id]
    </important_notes>

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against. If not provided the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

name: run_sql_transaction
description:
<use_case>
      Use this tool to execute a SQL transaction against a Neon database, should be used for multiple SQL statements.
    </use_case>

    <important_notes>
      If you have a temporary branch from a prior step, you MUST:
      1. Pass the branch ID to this tool unless explicitly told otherwise
      2. Tell the user that you are using the temporary branch with ID [branch_id]
    </important_notes>

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against. If not provided the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

name: describe_table_schema
description: Describe the schema of a table in a Neon database

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against. If not provided the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

name: get_database_tables
description: Get all tables in a Neon database

projectId.description: The ID of the project

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch. If not provided the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

name: create_branch
description: Create a branch in a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project to create the branch in

branchName.description: An optional name for the branch

name: prepare_database_migration
description:
<use_case>
    This tool performs database schema migrations by automatically generating and executing DDL statements.
    
    Supported operations:
    CREATE operations:
    - Add new columns (e.g., "Add email column to users table")
    - Create new tables (e.g., "Create posts table with title and content columns")
    - Add constraints (e.g., "Add unique constraint on `users.email`")

    ALTER operations:
    - Modify column types (e.g., "Change posts.views to bigint")
    - Rename columns (e.g., "Rename user_name to username in users table")
    - Add/modify indexes (e.g., "Add index on `posts.title`")
    - Add/modify foreign keys (e.g., "Add foreign key from `posts.user_id` to `users.id`")

    DROP operations:
    - Remove columns (e.g., "Drop temporary_field from users table")
    - Drop tables (e.g., "Drop the old_logs table")
    - Remove constraints (e.g., "Remove unique constraint from posts.slug")

    The tool will:
    1. Parse your natural language request
    2. Generate appropriate SQL
    3. Execute in a temporary branch for safety
    4. Verify the changes before applying to main branch
  </use_case>

  <workflow>
    1. Creates a temporary branch
    2. Applies the migration SQL in that branch
    3. Returns migration details for verification
  </workflow>

  <important_notes>
    After executing this tool, you MUST use `complete_database_migration` to apply changes.
  </important_notes>

migrationSql.description: The SQL to execute to create the migration

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

name: complete_database_migration
description: Complete a database migration started with prepare_database_migration

migrationSql.description: The SQL statements to apply. Pass the exact value from prepare_database_migration.

databaseName.description: The database name. Pass the exact value from prepare_database_migration.

projectId.description: The project ID. Pass the exact value from prepare_database_migration.

temporaryBranchId.description: The temporary branch ID to delete after migration.

parentBranchId.description: The parent branch ID where migration will be applied.

applyChanges.description: Whether to apply the migration. Set to false to just delete the temp branch without applying.

name: describe_branch
description: Describe a branch in a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project

branchId.description: An ID of the branch to describe

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

name: delete_branch
description: Delete a branch in a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing the branch

branchId.description: The ID of the branch to delete

name: reset_from_parent
description: Reset a branch to the state of its parent branch

projectId.description: The ID of the project

branchId.description: The ID of the branch to reset

name: get_connection_string
description: Get the connection string for a Neon database

projectId.description: The ID of the project. If not provided, the only available project will be used.

branchId.description: The ID or name of the branch. If not provided, the default branch will be used.

computeId.description: The ID of the compute/endpoint. If not provided, the read-write compute associated with the branch will be used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

roleName.description: The name of the role to connect with. If not provided, the database owner name will be used.

name: provision_neon_auth
description: Provision Neon Auth for a project to enable authentication

projectId.description: The ID of the project to provision Neon Auth for

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to provision Neon Auth for. If not provided, the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The database name to provision Neon Auth for. If not provided, the default database is used.

name: provision_neon_data_api
description: Provision the Neon Data API for a project to enable GraphQL and REST access to your database

projectId.description: The ID of the project to provision the Data API for

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to provision the Data API for. If not provided, the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The database name to provision the Data API for. If not provided, the default database is used.

authProvider.description: The authentication provider - "neon_auth" for Neon Auth integration, "external" for third-party providers like Clerk, Auth0, or Stytch, or "none" for unauthenticated access (not recommended). If not specified, the tool will check existing auth configuration and return options for selection.

jwksUrl.description: The JWKS URL for external authentication providers. Required when authProvider is "external".

providerName.description: The name of the external authentication provider (e.g., "Clerk", "Auth0", "Stytch"). Used when authProvider is "external".

jwtAudience.description: The expected JWT audience claim. Tokens without an audience claim will still be accepted.

name: explain_sql_statement
description: Explain a SQL statement to analyze its execution plan in a Neon database

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against. If not provided the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

analyze.description: Whether to include ANALYZE in the EXPLAIN command

name: prepare_query_tuning
description: Analyze a SQL query and suggest optimizations for improved performance

sql.description: The SQL statement to analyze and tune

databaseName.description: The name of the database to execute the query against

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

roleName.description: The role name to use for the connection

name: complete_query_tuning
description: Complete a query tuning session and apply the recommended optimizations

applyChanges.description: Whether to apply the recommended changes

name: list_slow_queries
description: List the slowest SQL queries in a Neon database for performance analysis

projectId.description: The ID of the project

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch. If not provided the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

limit.description: Maximum number of slow queries to return

name: list_branch_computes
description: List the compute endpoints for a branch in a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project

name: compare_database_schema
description: Compare the database schema between two branches in a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project

branchId.description: The ID of the branch to compare

baseBranchId.description: The ID of the base branch to compare against

description: Search Neon documentation and resources

name: fetch
description: Fetch content from a Neon documentation URL

name: list_docs_resources
description: List available Neon documentation resources

name: get_doc_resource
description: Get a specific Neon documentation resource

resourceId.description: The ID of the documentation resource
